description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa set consisting of three main pieces: a three-seater sofa, a two-seater loveseat, and a single armchair, all arranged in an L-shaped configuration. The upholstery is a smooth, light gray fabric with a matte finish, complemented by several accent pillows in darker shades of gray and brown. Each piece features straight, clean lines with track armrests that are level with the backrest, giving the set a contemporary and minimalist appearance. The seat and back cushions are loose, rectangular, and uniform in size, providing a plush and inviting look. The legs are short, cylindrical, and metallic, slightly elevating the furniture off the ground and adding a subtle modern touch. This set is designed for comfort and style, suitable for urban environments such as parks, public plazas, or communal indoor spaces.
description: A modern, light gray sectional sofa set with clean lines, track armrests, and metallic legs, featuring loose seat and back cushions and accent pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped arrangement, with all three pieces and accent pillows clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the back and side profiles of the sofa and loveseat, with the armchair in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of all three pieces, emphasizing the uniform height and straight lines of the backrests.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, focusing on the armchair and the side of the loveseat, with accent pillows visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple loose, rectangular seat and back cushions on each piece, uniform in size, with several accent pillows placed at the corners.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, track armrests present on all pieces, level with the backrest, with a boxy, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, cylindrical metallic legs at each corner, slightly exposed, with a simple and modern design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrests, continuous along each piece, with loose back cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
